CREATE TABLE test_ints (id Int32, value Int8, valueUInt UInt8);
INSERT INTO test_ints VALUES (1, 127, 255), (2, -128, 0);
SELECT id, value FROM test_ints WHERE value BETWEEN -128 AND 127;
SELECT id, valueUInt FROM test_ints WHERE valueUInt BETWEEN 0 AND 255;
CREATE TABLE test_bigints (big_id Int64, big_value Int64);
SELECT big_id, big_value FROM test_bigints WHERE big_value >= -9223372036854775808 AND big_value <= 9223372036854775807;
CREATE TABLE test_uints (uid Int32, u_value UInt16);
INSERT INTO test_uints VALUES (1, 65535), (2, 0);
SELECT uid, u_value FROM test_uints WHERE u_value BETWEEN 0 AND 65535;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id Int32, int_val Int32, uint_val UInt32);
SELECT id, int_val + 1 AS incremented_int_val FROM test_complex WHERE int_val + 1 > 0;
SELECT a.id, a.int_val, b.u_value FROM test_complex AS a JOIN test_uints AS b ON a.id = b.uid;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_ints WHERE value < 0;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id Int32, int_val Int16);
INSERT INTO test_nested VALUES (1, 32767), (2, -32768);
SELECT id, int_val FROM (SELECT * FROM test_nested) AS subquery WHERE int_val >= -32768 AND int_val <= 32767;
CREATE TABLE test_multi_types (id Int32, int_val Int128, uint_val UInt128);
SELECT id FROM test_multi_types WHERE int_val = 170141183460469231731687303715884105727;
SELECT id FROM test_multi_types WHERE uint_val > 0 AND uint_val <= 340282366920938463463374607431768211455;
